sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed - compare before and after excluding the HUD bar
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Get all nodes except the background (id=0) and bottom bar
def get_gameplay_nodes(seg):
    return [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['id'] != 0 and n['boundary'][0][0] != 63]

before_nodes = get_gameplay_nodes(before.segmentation)
after_nodes = get_gameplay_nodes(after.segmentation)

print("=== BEFORE (gameplay only) ===")
for n in before_nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\n=== AFTER (gameplay only) ===")
for n in after_nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check cross pattern area
ascii_after = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Top-right cross area ===")
for r in range(9, 13):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_after[r][50:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
